offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 deliveries/week, inefficient routes cause delayed deliveries. We optimize routes instead of manual route planning using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient delivery routes leading to increased fuel costs and delayed deliveries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers discussions on delivery optimization
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Community forums for logistics tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try route visualization and delivery time estimation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
